title: オークスの後に・Full of Joy

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: (Ahh, running is so fun!)

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, Fine Motion!
You were wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
She looked like she was having so much fun out
there—I couldn't take my eyes off her!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: This is seriously gonna be Fine Motion's year!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
O-oh, I just realized... Do you think it's okay to
refer to her like that?!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're right! Um... maybe "lady" works? Lady
Fine Motion?!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Everyone, please refer to me just as you would
anyone else!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: And thank you so much for your cheers! ♪ Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Formerly Trembling Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Fine!

text_block_list.name: Formerly Trembling Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry about before. I'd just got so afraid of
running...

text_block_list.name: Formerly Trembling Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
But I was drawn in by how you ran, and I started
to enjoy it myself. I'm going to do my best to feel
that way again!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Great! I'll be rooting for you!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I'm back. Today was so much fun! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion greets me happily, but for some
reason, I sense something off about her smile.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Pardon? What do you mean?
choice_data_list: If it's nothing, that's fine, but...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I was just thinking about something. But it really
isn't important.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I was just thinking about how everyone is running
with their own unique circumstances.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It's something I should have realized long ago!
They aren't out there running just for the sake of
it.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
When it comes to the Classics in particular... there
are many who dream solely of running in them.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But it's different for me. I've always had my duties
apart from racing...
choice_data_list: ...Do you feel like less of a racer?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That's not it. At least, I'd like to think it's a little
different.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Actually, that would be rather disrespectful. I'm
here because I'm qualified to be here, after all.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
So it's not about feeling inferior. It's more like...
It's difficult to put into words.
choice_data_list: You have your own circumstances too.
You have your own circumstances too.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Believe me, I know. Let's just move on...
choice_data_list:
There's nothing wrong with having running as
your dream.

There's nothing wrong with having running as
your dream.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yes, you're right. Running has surely always been
my dream.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Sigh... But still, I couldn't believe it when I realized how selfish I've been!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I was rather serious about wanting everyone to do
their best for my sake. I feel like I've discovered a
new side of myself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The desire to compete with everything you
have—that may be something every Umamusume
possesses from birth.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Instinct, you say...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I can't say I'd be happy if that were the case.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: It's nothing! I'm going to go get changed!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh. It's still so bright outside.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Really?!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh! That means summer camp, right?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tracen Academy holds a camp each year when
the weather turns to the warmer. It's a great
opportunity to have the runners really hone in on
core skills.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That means going out and having a sleepover
with everyone! I can hardly wait.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: And training, of course!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And then once camp is over, the final stop on the
Triple Tiara tour—the Shuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion is focused on her next race. It's
almost as if the spectacle of the Shuka Sho is
already a twinkle in her eyes.
